agent_hint: Create a new attendance record. Required: employee_id (reference to thr_employee), date. Optional: check_in, check_out, type (NORMAL/LATE/EARLY_LEAVE/ABSENT, defaults to NORMAL), notes. Auto-generated: code (ATT-yyyyMMdd-seq).
output_description: Returns the created attendance record with auto-generated code.

agent_hint: Update an existing attendance record. All fields except code are editable: employee, date, check-in/out times, type, notes.
output_description: Returns the updated attendance record with all modified fields.

agent_hint: Delete an attendance record permanently. This is irreversible. No status preconditions — any attendance record can be deleted by users with manage permission.
output_description: Returns confirmation of deletion; the attendance record is permanently removed.

agent_hint: Retrieve a single attendance record by ID. Returns all fields including employee, date, check-in/out times, and type.
precondition_description: Attendance record with the specified ID must exist.
output_description: Returns the full attendance record including all fields.

agent_hint: Query attendance records with pagination and filtering. Supports filters by employee, date, type. Supports keyword search on code.
precondition_description: No preconditions — returns empty list if no records match.
output_description: Returns a paginated list of attendance records matching the specified filters.
